title: Honest scope.
description: I'll tell you upfront what I can do and what I can't. If it's something I need to figure out, that's on my dime — not yours.

title: Real timelines.
description: I give you a real finish date and keep you in the loop if anything changes. No phantom deadlines.

title: No surprises.
description: The price in the proposal is the price you pay. If something changes, we talk about it before any extra work starts.
